messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-510 🎵 in progress — Fix two pre-existing defects in bl455PipelineBoardSteps.js so BL-455's acceptance feature passes 8/8: (1) lastRendered() must not depend on a vestigial `edited` array the shared bl452 Given no longer builds, and (2) splitBoardSections() must split the grid at the FIRST below-grid list header, not only 'PARKED:', so an awaiting-approval-only board is not misclassified as all-grid
